lint.command: echo "ESLint not configured yet — lint is a no-op until ci-enhancement feature adds it"

blockingIssues.description: dualvm/scripts/liveRiskAdminSmoke.ts still drives MarketVersionRegistry registration/activation through risk-admin AccessManager calls even though governed deployments remap those actions to the timelock/governor path, so the live risk smoke path is incompatible with the new governance model.
dualvm/test/GovernorLifecycle.ts never exercises GovernanceToken.mint(...), so the promised AccessManager-gated mint path is unverified despite being part of the feature contract.

dualvm/lib/deployment/deployGovernedSystem.ts still bootstraps by calling deployDualVmSystem() first, leaving the implementation EOA-bootstrap-first rather than the required Governor -> TimelockController -> AccessManager -> protocol-contract deployment flow.

dualvm/scripts/deployGoverned.ts weakens admin-delay protection by defaulting adminDelaySeconds to 60 seconds when ADMIN_DELAY_SECONDS is unset, instead of preserving the configured 3600-second target admin delay.

dualvm/test/LendingHardened.ts does not actually test VAL-OZ-001; it only checks ABI function presence rather than demonstrating that a reentrancy attempt reverts on protected LendingCore and DebtPool flows.
dualvm/test/LendingHardened.ts does not meaningfully test VAL-OZ-002; it never simulates the ERC4626 inflation-attack path, so a vulnerable implementation could still pass.

appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/xcm-precompile.md documenting the canonical XCM precompile address, interface surface, official docs URL, and the local-Hardhat limitation that weighMessage reverts without the precompile.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax the solidity-worker skill's mandatory 'write tests first (red)' rule so it explicitly allows discovery-first flows for new contract/interface work, deployment-helper refinements, and test-hardening tasks where understanding existing code or external specs must come first.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review reports for governor-contracts, governor-deployment-helpers, xcm-precompile-contract, and lending-test-hardening all independently flagged the same mismatch between the skill's required red-first workflow and the work that actually succeeded or needed to be reviewed.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated shared-state notes from governor-contracts, governor-deployment-helpers, and lending-test-hardening about the same solidity-worker red-first mismatch.
